title: Beijing 2022
overview: Shot over more than two years, the official film of the 2022 Winter Olympic Games in Beijing goes behind the scenes to share the stories of international and Chinese athletes, volunteers, medical personnel and officials - against the backdrop of a global pandemic.

trailers.title: Beijing 2022 official film to be released on May 19｜Winter Olympics｜苏翊鸣｜羽生結弦｜北京冬奥会官方电影《北京2022》定档预告
